query:
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT remoteJid, pushName
  FROM (
    SELECT remoteJid, pushName, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY remoteJid ORDER BY timestamp DESC) as rn
    FROM messages 
    WHERE sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001' 
      AND fromMe = 0 
      AND pushName IS NOT NULL 
      AND pushName != ''
      AND pushName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$'
      AND pushName != 'Você'
      AND pushName != 'You'
  ) ranked
  WHERE rn = 1
) m ON wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid
SET wc.contactPushName = m.pushName
WHERE wc.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
  AND (wc.contactPushName IS NULL OR wc.contactPushName = '' OR wc.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$');

      AND fromMe = 0 
      AND pushName IS NOT NULL 
      AND pushName != ''
      AND pushName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$'
      AND pushName != 'Você'
      AND pushName != 'You'
  ) ranked
  WHERE rn = 1
) m ON wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid
SET wc.contactPushName = m.pushName
WHERE wc.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
  AND (wc.contactPushName IS NULL OR wc.contactPushName = '' OR wc.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$');
